__faion_header__.purpose: JSON example of one reactivation sequence spec
__faion_header__.consumes: scored contacts + sequence template + owner sign-off

touches.subject: How's <project> doing one year on?
touches.body: Hey <name>, you shipped the onboarding rebuild in August — curious how the funnel held up. Worth a 15-min sync?

touches.subject: One small idea for <project>
touches.body: Saw <signal> — would a 2-week pilot to <outcome> make sense for Q3?

touches.subject: Closing the loop
touches.body: Last note from me this quarter — want me to keep you on the seasonal review list?
